prompt_text:
### Demographics: 72-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 21 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 86.4 kg; Height 172.6 cm; BMI 29.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 270mg/dL; 9 months ago 235mg/dL; 6 months ago 235mg/dL; 3 months ago 218mg/dL; current 151mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 85.7kg; 9 months ago 85.8kg; 6 months ago 83.2kg; 3 months ago 87.2kg; current 86.4kg), Height (12 months ago 172.6cm; 9 months ago 172.6cm; 6 months ago 172.6cm; 3 months ago 172.6cm; current 172.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 12U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 6.5mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 8.4mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.4mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 2.8mL/min/1.73m²; current 4mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 1035mg/g; 9 months ago 1142mg/g; 6 months ago 1271mg/g; 3 months ago 962mg/g; current 825mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 132mg/dL; 9 months ago 129mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 128mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
